contextNoteAnyTab.message: Quick toggles are saved now and sync when YouTube is open.

contextNoteInlinePanel.message: Open the full workspace on this tab; quick toggles apply immediately.

contextNoteLaunch.message: Open a watchable YouTube tab to use the full in-page workspace.

dataFlowNote.message: Active origins are highlighted. Disable the driving toggle to mute an origin entirely.

dlProgressActiveTpl.message: …% complete. Stay on YouTube while Astra Downloader finishes.

dlProgressConnectAudio.message: Connecting to the local audio downloader.

dlProgressConnectVideo.message: Connecting to the local video downloader.

dlProgressLostCopy.message: Astra Deck lost contact with Astra Downloader. Choose Repair downloader to recover.

dlProgressReconnectingCopy.message: Momentary hiccup with Astra Downloader — retrying automatically.

emptyNoMatchHint.message: Clear the filter to see every quick control again.

emptyNoTogglesHint.message: The popup could not load any quick controls right now.

extActionTitle.description: Tooltip text for the toolbar action button.

extDescription.message: Premium watch-page customization, split layouts, content controls, and local downloads for YouTube.
extDescription.description: The extension description shown in the browser's extension management page.

extName.description: The extension name displayed in the browser UI.

feature_abHide_ask_desc.message: Hide Ask or AI button below videos

feature_abHide_moreActions_desc.message: Hide more actions button below videos

feature_abLoop_desc.message: Set two points on the video timeline and loop between them. Visual markers on the progress bar.

feature_adaptiveLiveLayout_desc.message: Automatically adjust layout for live stream chat side-by-side

feature_ageRestrictionBypass_desc.message: Bypass age verification by fetching video data from YouTube's embed endpoint. No sign-in required.

feature_aiVideoSummary_desc.message: Bring-your-own-key LLM summary of the current video transcript (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/Ollama)

feature_alwaysShowProgressBar_desc.message: Keep the video progress bar visible at all times instead of hiding on idle

feature_antiTranslateAudioTrack_desc.message: When YouTube serves an auto-dubbed audio track, attempt to switch back to the original. Best-effort — works through movie_player getAvailableAudioTracks() / setAudioTrack() when present.

feature_antiTranslateTranscript_desc.message: Strips translation track parameters from the engagement-panel transcript URL so YouTube serves the original-language captions. Best-effort; works when the original-language track is available.

feature_antiTranslate_desc.message: Prevent YouTube from auto-translating video titles AND descriptions to your locale. Restores the original-language text on grid thumbnails + watch page.

feature_astraContextMenu_desc.message: Right-click the player or a feed card to get Astra actions: Hide channel, Copy video URL, Copy timestamp link, Open transcript. Default off — adds a contextmenu listener; never blocks the native YouTube right-click.

feature_audioTrackLanguage_desc.message: Stores your preferred audio language without opening YouTube settings automatically. YouTube restarts playback when scripts switch audio tracks through the native menu.

feature_autoClosePopups_desc.message: Automatically dismisses cookie consent, survey prompts, and other YouTube popups

feature_autoDismissStillWatching_desc.message: Automatically clicks the "Continue Watching" button when YouTube pauses playback for inactivity

feature_autoDownloadOnVisit_desc.message: Automatically start download when visiting a video page

feature_autoExpandComments_desc.message: Automatically expand truncated comments so full text is always visible

feature_autoExpandDescription_desc.message: Automatically expands the video description so you never need to click "Show more"

feature_autoLikeSubscribed_desc.message: Automatically like videos from channels you're subscribed to after watching for 30 seconds

feature_autoMaxResolution_desc.message: Force the highest available stream on every video (1080p Premium when offered)

feature_autoOpenChapters_desc.message: Automatically open the chapters panel when available

feature_autoOpenTranscript_desc.message: Automatically open the transcript panel when available

feature_autoPauseOnSwitch_desc.message: Pauses playback when you switch to another tab, resumes when you return

feature_autoSkipChapters_desc.message: Automatically skip chapters matching patterns (intro, outro, recap, sponsor). Comma-separated.

feature_autoSubtitles_desc.message: Automatically turns on closed captions when a video starts playing

feature_autoTheaterMode_desc.message: Automatically enter theater (wide) mode when opening a video

feature_blueLightFilter_desc.message: Apply a warm tint to reduce blue light emission. Configurable intensity.

feature_bulkCardActions_desc.message: Toggle select-mode to multi-pick feed cards, then bulk hide, allow, or copy URLs. A floating action bar appears while selecting.

feature_bypassPlaylistMode_desc.message: Strip the &list= parameter from clicked thumbnails so you don't get stuck inside someone's playlist

feature_channelAgeDisplay_desc.message: Shows how old a video is (e.g. "2 years, 3 months ago") next to the upload date

feature_channelSubCount_desc.message: Shows the channel subscriber count more prominently below videos

feature_chapterJumpButtons_desc.message: Prev/Next chapter buttons in the player right-controls — skip to the previous or next chapter

feature_chapterNavButtons_desc.message: Add Previous/Next Chapter buttons to the video player controls

feature_chatHide_header_desc.message: Hide the live chat header bar

feature_chatKeywordFilter_desc.message: Hide chat messages containing these words (comma-separated)

feature_chatStyleComments_desc.message: Premium comment layout that preserves pinned comments, creator hearts, replies, and native actions

feature_cinemaAmbientGlow_desc.message: Projects dominant video colors as a soft glow behind the player for an immersive cinema feel

feature_classicLayoutProfile_desc.message: Pick a layout profile. Modern keeps YouTube's 2025 layout. Classic 2020 restores tighter spacing and the smaller masthead. Classic 2016 restores the older watch page proportions.

feature_classicPlayerChrome_desc.message: One-toggle restoration of the pre-Delhi/Liquid Glass player look: opaque square controls, classic progress bar, original time display

feature_cleanShareUrls_desc.message: Strip tracking params (si, pp, feature) from copied/shared YouTube links

feature_cleanUiPreset_desc.message: Owner preset: hides panel branding, search, and category headers, compresses navigation, silences toast notifications, and hides the subscriptions resume banner. Off by default.

feature_codecSelector_desc.message: Choose which video codec to prefer: Auto, H.264 (low CPU), VP9, or AV1 (best quality). Shares codec engine with Force H.264.

feature_colorThemeManager_desc.message: Apply a color palette across YouTube (dark mode only)

feature_commentEnhancements_desc.message: Highlight creator/OP replies, show like heat indicators, and add collapse-all-replies toggle per thread

feature_commentFilterManager_desc.message: Hide comment threads whose author or text matches a rule. Comma-separated keywords, !word to allowlist, or /pattern/flags for regex (ReDoS-guarded).

feature_commentFilterRules_desc.message: One rule per line or comma-separated. word hides matches, !word always allows, @author targets the author, /pattern/i runs a regex (ReDoS-guarded).

feature_commentNavigator_desc.message: Floating thread navigator with live counts for visible comments and filtered results

feature_commentSearch_desc.message: Adds a search bar above comments to filter and find specific comments

feature_compactLayout_desc.message: Reduce spacing and padding for a denser interface

feature_compactUnfixedHeader_desc.message: Reduce header height and let it scroll away instead of staying fixed

feature_condenseComments_desc.message: Reduce spacing between comments for a tighter layout

feature_copyChapterMarkdown_desc.message: Copy all video chapters as a markdown timestamp list — button in player controls

feature_copyVideoTitle_desc.message: Adds a copy button next to the video title for one-click title copying

feature_creatorCommentHighlight_desc.message: Makes creator-badged and creator-hearted comments stand out with a stronger visual treatment

feature_customCssInjection_desc.message: Inject your own custom CSS rules into YouTube pages

feature_customProgressBarColor_desc.message: Change the red progress bar to any color

feature_customSelectionColor_desc.message: Override the default text-selection background with your chosen color

feature_customSpeedButtons_desc.message: Adds quick speed buttons below the video player with presets from 0.5x to 3x

feature_daCacheTTL_desc.message: Hours to cache branding data locally before refreshing

feature_daFallbackFormat_desc.message: Format the original title when no crowdsourced submission exists

feature_daReplaceThumbs_desc.message: Replace clickbait thumbnails with video screenshots

feature_daReplaceTitles_desc.message: Replace clickbait titles with crowdsourced alternatives

feature_daShowOriginalHover_desc.message: Hover over a replaced title to see the original

feature_deArrowChannelOverridesPanel_des.message: Adds a small DeArrow mode chip next to the channel name on the watch page. Cycles through DeArrow → Original → Off → DeArrow per click. Overrides persist in deArrowChannelOverrides keyed by channel ID.

feature_deArrow_desc.message: Replace clickbait titles and thumbnails with crowdsourced alternatives from the DeArrow database

feature_dearrowPeekButton_desc.message: Hold Alt to temporarily reveal original YouTube titles (undoes DeArrow/custom titles while pressed)

feature_debugMode_desc.message: Enable verbose diagnostic logging to the console

feature_denseMode_desc.message: Tightens row spacing, padding, and font metrics across Astra-injected surfaces. Does not change YouTube's native layout — only our own panels, chips, pills, and toolbars.

feature_diagnosticLog_desc.message: Capture a rolling log of YTKit errors and export as JSON for bug reports

feature_digitalWellbeing_desc.message: Break reminders every N minutes of active playback + optional daily watch-time cap. Timers persist across SPA navigation.

feature_disableAutoplayNext_desc.message: Prevents the next video from automatically playing when the current one finishes

feature_disableInfiniteScroll_desc.message: Replace infinite scroll with a "Load More" button on home, search, and subscriptions pages

feature_disableLoudnessNormalization_des.message: Stop YouTube from compressing the dynamic range of newly-loaded videos. Best effort — YouTube clamps the gain through movie_player APIs that aren’t officially supported.

feature_disableMiniPlayer_desc.message: Prevent the mini player from appearing when navigating away

feature_disablePlayOnHover_desc.message: Stop videos from playing when hovering over thumbnails

feature_disableSpaNavigation_desc.message: Force full page loads instead of YouTube's smooth transitions (fixes player sizing issues)

feature_downloadCobaltFallback_desc.message: When Astra Downloader is unreachable, fall back to a configurable cobalt.tools instance. Only runs in the GitHub/full profile and only when Astra Downloader is offline. POSTs the current video URL to the configured instance and opens the returned media URL in a new tab.

feature_downloadHealthPanel_desc.message: Show pills for Astra Downloader yt-dlp version, ffmpeg freshness, and PO Token provider state next to the download button. Reads /health every 30 s; no extra storage.

feature_downloadHistoryPanel_desc.message: Adds a "History" button next to the download button on watch pages. Lists the last 50 downloads recorded by Astra Downloader. Local-only — fetched from the local /history endpoint per session.

feature_downloadScreenshotFormat_desc.message: Output format for the player screenshot button. PNG is lossless and copies to clipboard; JPEG/WebP are smaller files but download-only.

feature_downloadStreamLinksPanel_desc.message: Advanced: expose the raw adaptive video/audio stream URLs (mp4/webm) parsed from ytInitialPlayerResponse. Local-only — no telemetry. Useful for yt-dlp / VLC handoff. Default off.

feature_downloadSubtitlesWithScreenshot_.message: Bake the currently rendered caption line into the bottom band of the screenshot. Off by default. Requires Video Screenshot.

feature_downloadThumbnail_desc.message: Adds a button below the video to download the current video thumbnail in max resolution

feature_downloadVideoFormat_desc.message: Default container format for video downloads

feature_enableCPU_Tamer_desc.message: Reduce CPU usage by throttling background timers via requestAnimationFrame gating

feature_enableHandleRevealer_desc.message: Show the original channel name next to @handle in comments

feature_expandVideoWidth_desc.message: Stretch the video to fill the space when sidebar is hidden

feature_feedTriageProfile_desc.message: Flip on a curated focus recipe: hides Shorts, live streams, upcoming premieres, mixes, watched videos, and AI Summary. Toggling off restores prior values.

feature_fineSpeedControl_desc.message: Extend speed range to 0.1x-16x with 0.05x increments. Scroll on the speed badge to adjust.

feature_fitPlayerToWindow_desc.message: Make the video player fill the entire browser window

feature_floatingLogoOnWatch_desc.message: Replace native player right-controls with Astra quick links, local tools, and settings

feature_focusedMode_desc.message: Hides everything except the video player and comments for a distraction-free experience

feature_forceDarkEverywhere_desc.message: Applies dark theme to YouTube pages that may not respect dark mode (settings, about, etc.)

feature_forceDarkEverywhere_name.message: Force Dark on All YouTube Pages

feature_forceH264_desc.message: Prefer H.264 (AVC) over VP9/AV1 for lower CPU usage on older hardware. May reduce max quality. Uses MAIN world codec bridge.

feature_forceStandardFps_desc.message: Dims HFR entries in the quality menu. For reliable 30fps, enable Force H.264 which caps at 1080p30.

feature_forcedColorsSupport_desc.message: Always active: when the OS reports forced-colors (Windows High Contrast, GTK forced colors), Astra-injected controls automatically use system colors so text remains readable and focus rings are visible. The media query itself is the gate; this toggle is retained for settings compatibility and has no additional effect.

feature_frameByFrameButtons_desc.message: Add visible step-back (,) and step-forward (.) buttons to the player controls for precise frame navigation

feature_fullTitles_desc.message: Remove the 2-line clamp on thumbnail titles so long titles show in full

feature_fullWidthSubscriptions_desc.message: Expand the subscription grid to fill the page

feature_fullscreenOnDoubleClick_desc.message: Double-click anywhere on the video to toggle fullscreen (replaces default seek behavior)

feature_globalAriaLiveRegion_desc.message: Mounts a single hidden role=status / aria-live=polite container under the document body. Screen readers announce any text Astra writes into it (toast bodies, filter outcomes, download status changes).

feature_grayscaleThumbnails_desc.message: Shows thumbnails in grayscale to reduce visual distraction — color restores on hover

feature_hiddenActionButtonsManager_desc.message: Choose which action buttons to hide below videos

feature_hiddenChatElementsManager_desc.message: Choose which live chat elements to hide

feature_hiddenPlayerControlsManager_desc.message: Choose which player control buttons to hide

feature_hiddenWatchElementsManager_desc.message: Choose which elements to hide below videos

feature_hideAiSummary_desc.message: Remove AI-generated summaries and Ask AI buttons

feature_hideAirplayButton_desc.message: Remove the Airplay icon from the player controls

feature_hideAutoplayToggle_desc.message: Removes the autoplay toggle switch from the player controls

feature_hideChannelJoinButton_desc.message: Remove the Join/membership button on channel pages

feature_hideCollaborations_desc.message: Hide videos from channels you're not subscribed to in your subscriptions feed

feature_hideCommentActionMenu_desc.message: Remove action menu from individual comments

feature_hideCommentDislikeButton_desc.message: Remove the dislike button from comment actions since it adds no useful feedback

feature_hideCommentTeaser_desc.message: Remove the "Scroll for comments" prompt on watch pages

feature_hideCreateButton_desc.message: Remove the "Create" button from the header toolbar

feature_hideDescriptionExtras_desc.message: Remove extra elements in the description area

feature_hideDescriptionRow_desc.message: Remove the video description panel below the player

feature_hideEndCards_desc.message: Removes the clickable end screen cards/annotations that overlay the video in the last seconds. Also covered by Hide Video End Content.

feature_hideHashtags_desc.message: Remove hashtag links above video titles

feature_hideInfoCards_desc.message: Removes the "i" info card teasers and popups that appear during video playback

feature_hideInfoPanels_desc.message: Remove Wikipedia/context info boxes that appear below videos (FEMA, COVID, etc.)

feature_hideJumpAheadButton_desc.message: Remove the Jump Ahead prompt that appears after skipping on eligible videos.

feature_hideLatestPosts_desc.message: Hide community posts and updates sections from feeds

feature_hideLiveChatEngagement_desc.message: Remove engagement prompts in live chat

feature_hideMembersOnly_desc.message: Hide members-only feed cards on Home and Subscriptions

feature_hideNewsHome_desc.message: Hide news sections from the homepage

feature_hideNotificationBadge_desc.message: Removes the red notification count badge from the bell icon

feature_hideNotificationButton_desc.message: Remove the notification bell icon from the header

feature_hidePaidContentOverlay_desc.message: Remove "Includes paid promotion" overlays on thumbnails and watch pages

feature_hidePaidPromotionWatch_desc.message: Remove "paid promotion" labels on watch pages

feature_hidePinnedComments_desc.message: Remove pinned comments from the comments section

feature_hidePlayables_desc.message: Hide YouTube Playables gaming content from feeds

feature_hidePlaylistsHome_desc.message: Hide playlist sections from the homepage

feature_hideQueueOnThumbnails_desc.message: Remove the "Add to queue" overlay button that appears on thumbnail hover

feature_hideRelatedVideos_desc.message: Remove the related videos panel on watch pages

feature_hideSidebar_desc.message: Remove the left navigation sidebar completely

feature_hideSubscriptionOptions_desc.message: Remove the "Latest" header and view toggles on subscriptions

feature_hideVideoEndContent_desc.message: Remove end cards, end screen, annotations, and video grid when videos finish. Superset of Hide End Screen Cards.

feature_hideVideosFromHome_desc.message: Hide videos/channels from feeds. Includes keyword filter, duration filter, and channel blocking.

feature_hideVoiceSearch_desc.message: Remove the microphone icon from the search bar

feature_hideWatchedVideos_desc.message: Dim or hide videos with a red progress bar (already watched) from feeds

feature_homepageGridAlign_desc.message: Force uniform thumbnail grid on the homepage — prevents misaligned rows caused by variable title/metadata heights

feature_initialPlayerStateBackground_des.message: When opening a watch page in a background tab, play or pause regardless of YouTube’s default. Useful for queueing-up multiple tabs.

feature_initialPlayerStateForeground_des.message: When opening a watch page in the foreground, play or pause regardless of the previous session’s autoplay choice. “Inherit” leaves YouTube’s native behavior alone.

feature_keyMoments_desc.message: Highlights chapter markers on the progress bar with colored segments for quick visual navigation

feature_likeViewRatio_desc.message: Shows the like-to-view percentage next to the view count on watch pages

feature_localAiSummary_desc.message: Use Chrome’s built-in Summarizer API when available. Falls back to a clear "not available" message — never silently routes to a remote provider. Adds a "Local Summary" button next to the existing AI Summary button.

feature_logoToSubscriptions_desc.message: Point the native YouTube home mark to your subscriptions feed

feature_lowPowerProfile_desc.message: When on, disables CPU-heavy features (cinema ambient glow, visual filters, playback stats overlay, monetization indicator, transcript index, transcript viewer, blue light filter) and bumps storage LRU sweep cadence. Toggle off to restore previous values from the backup snapshot.

feature_miniPlayerBar_desc.message: Shows a floating mini-player bar at the bottom when you scroll past the video

feature_monetizationIndicator_desc.message: Adds a pill under the title showing whether the video is monetized (has ads / sponsorship overlay) or not. Heuristic — uses paid promotion overlay, sponsorship card, and SponsorBlock category data when available.

feature_musicVideoSpeedLock_desc.message: When Persistent Playback Speed is enabled, keep music-category videos at 1× so songs aren't sped up

feature_newPlayerUiRestore_desc.message: Hides YouTube's new-player chrome elements (Delhi modern overflow panel, pill action surfaces). Restores a tighter progress bar and original-style controls.

feature_noAmbientMode_desc.message: Turn off the glowing background effect that matches video colors

feature_noFrostedGlass_desc.message: Remove blur effects from UI elements

feature_notInterestedButton_desc.message: Add an X button on video thumbnails to quickly dismiss videos via YouTube's feedback API

feature_notifyAutoDubbedAudio_desc.message: Show a one-time toast when YouTube auto-selects an AI-dubbed audio track (e.g. an English-dubbed Korean video). You can manually switch to the original track in the player settings.

feature_nyanCatProgressBar_desc.message: Replace the video progress bar with a Nyan Cat animation

feature_oledTheme_desc.message: True OLED black (#000) backgrounds via the --yt-sys-color-baseline tokens. Survives YouTube's native theme switches because we hook the tokens themselves, not the surface classes.

feature_openInAlternativeFrontend_desc.message: Adds a button next to the player to open the current video in your configured alternative frontend (Invidious / Piped / FreeTube). Default instance is yewtu.be; change via alternativeFrontendInstance setting.

feature_openInNewTab_desc.message: Makes video links on the home/subscriptions page open in a new tab instead of navigating away

feature_pauseOtherTabs_desc.message: When a video starts playing, pause YouTube in all other tabs

feature_pcHide_next_desc.message: Hide next video button from player

feature_pcHide_settings_desc.message: Hide settings gear from player controls

feature_pcHide_theater_desc.message: Hide theater mode button from player

feature_pcHide_ytLogo_desc.message: Hide the native brand button from player controls

feature_perChannelIntroOutro_desc.message: Skip the first N and last M seconds of every video on a given channel. Set offsets per channel from the watch page (Tools → Set Intro/Outro). Stored under perChannelIntroOutroData.

feature_perChannelSpeed_desc.message: Remember and auto-apply preferred playback speed for each channel

feature_persistentSpeed_desc.message: Remember your preferred playback speed globally and auto-apply it to every video

feature_pipButton_desc.message: Adds a one-click PiP button to the player controls for native browser Picture-in-Picture

feature_playbackSpeedOSD_desc.message: Show speed overlay on the video player (like VLC) instead of corner toast

feature_playbackStatsOverlay_desc.message: Shows video codec, resolution, bitrate, and dropped frame count as a togglable overlay

feature_playlistEnhancer_desc.message: Adds shuffle, copy, and hide-duplicate tools to playlist panels

feature_playlistQuickRemove_desc.message: Show a trash icon on each item in playlists you own for one-click removal

feature_playlistSearch_desc.message: Adds a search input above playlist panels to filter items by title

feature_popOutPlayer_desc.message: Detach the video into a resizable floating Picture-in-Picture window with transport controls

feature_preciseViewCounts_desc.message: Show full view counts (1,234,567) instead of truncated (1.2M)

feature_preloadComments_desc.message: Eagerly load the comment section so it is ready when you scroll down

feature_premiumLiveChat_desc.message: Refine live chat with a polished header, elevated message rows, and a premium composer.

feature_preventAutoplay_desc.message: Stop videos from automatically playing on page load

feature_qualityProfileMatrix_desc.message: Set different default qualities for normal / theater / fullscreen / background / embed contexts. ISOLATED-world detects the context and writes data-ytkit-quality-context on <html>; the MAIN-world bridge re-applies the matching quality via movie_player.setPlaybackQualityRange().

feature_quickLinkEditor_desc.message: Customize the Astra launcher menu. One link per line: Label | URL

feature_quickLinkMenu_desc.message: Adds a compact quick-links menu in the masthead with customizable links

feature_reactionSpammer_desc.message: Select live chat reactions and send them in a randomized loop.

feature_rectangularizeYouTube_desc.message: Strips YouTube's pill / stadium / fully-rounded backdrops. Any backdrop with border-radius > 12px gets clamped to 8px. Avatars and progress rings stay circular.

feature_redditComments_desc.message: Find Reddit discussions mentioning the current video (button in secondary sidebar)

feature_redirectHomeToSubs_desc.message: Automatically redirect the YouTube homepage to your subscriptions feed

feature_redirectShorts_desc.message: Open Shorts in the standard video player

feature_redirectToVideosTab_desc.message: Open channel pages directly on the Videos tab

feature_reducedMotion_desc.message: Forces every Astra-injected animation, transition, and scroll behavior to be near-instant. Respects the OS prefers-reduced-motion setting automatically; this toggle adds an unconditional override on top.

feature_remainingTimeDisplay_desc.message: Show time remaining next to current time in the player, adjusted for playback speed

feature_rememberVolume_desc.message: Persist your volume level across videos and sessions

feature_removeAllShorts_desc.message: Hide all Shorts videos from feeds and recommendations

feature_researchSpacedReview_desc.message: Export study/work-mode data to Markdown or CSV: watch-time totals, focused-mode state, digital-wellbeing state, and timestamp bookmarks with deep links.

feature_researchTranscriptIndex_desc.message: Indexes the transcript of every video you open into a local IndexedDB. Adds a global "Search Transcripts" panel surfaced from the popup or via window.__ytkitSearchTranscripts(query). Index can be cleared from settings; no telemetry.

feature_researchTranscriptSearchPanel_de.message: Adds a "Search transcripts" button on the watch page that opens a search UI over the local IndexedDB transcript index. Requires Transcript Search Index to be on. Default off.

feature_restoreNativeYouTubeUi_desc.message: Show the channel/comment avatars and home-feed shelves that Astra Deck hides by default.

feature_resumePlayback_desc.message: Remember where you stopped watching and automatically resume from that point

feature_returnDislike_desc.message: Restore an estimated dislike count via the public Return YouTube Dislike API. Cached locally; respects a 100 req/min budget. No cookies sent. Off by default.

feature_reversePlaylist_desc.message: Adds a "Reverse" button to playlist panels to play oldest first

feature_rssFeedLink_desc.message: Show an RSS feed link on channel pages for subscribing via RSS readers

feature_sbCat_poi_highlight_desc.message: Jump to the highlight/point of interest (disabled by default)

feature_sbCat_preview_desc.message: Preview or recap of upcoming content

feature_sbCat_selfpromo_desc.message: Creator promoting their own products or channels

feature_scrollToPlayer_desc.message: Automatically scrolls to the top of the page when navigating to a new video

feature_scrollWheelSpeed_desc.message: Adjust playback speed by scrolling the mouse wheel over the video player

feature_searchFilterDefaults_desc.message: Automatically apply a default sort order (upload date, view count, or rating) to YouTube search results

feature_selectorHealthPanel_desc.message: Review live selector drift signals and export a JSON health report for fixture refreshes.

feature_settingsProfiles_desc.message: Save, load, switch, import, and export named setting configurations (e.g. Gaming / Work / Music). Controls appear at the top of the settings panel when enabled.

feature_shareMenuCleaner_desc.message: Removes social media buttons from the share dialog, leaving only the URL copy option

feature_shortsAsRegularVideo_desc.message: Add native browser playback controls and scrubbing to YouTube Shorts

feature_showChannelVideoCount_desc.message: Display total uploaded video count next to the channel name on watch pages

feature_showLocalDownloadButton_desc.message: Add a yt-dlp download options button on watch pages

feature_showPlaylistDuration_desc.message: Display total playlist runtime and speed-adjusted estimate next to the playlist header

feature_showStatisticsDashboard_desc.message: Track videos watched, time on YouTube, and videos hidden

feature_showTimeInTabTitle_desc.message: Prepend current playback time [5:23] to the browser tab title

feature_sleepTimer_desc.message: Pause playback after a chosen number of minutes. The player countdown chip lets you cancel or add 5 minutes.

feature_sortCommentsNewest_desc.message: Automatically switch the comment sort order to "Newest first" on every video

feature_speedIndicatorOverlay_desc.message: Shows the current playback speed as a small overlay on the video when not at 1x

feature_speedStep_desc.message: How much to change speed per scroll tick

feature_sponsorBlock_desc.message: Automatically skip sponsored segments, intros, outros, and other non-content sections using crowdsourced data

feature_squareAvatars_desc.message: Make channel avatars square instead of round

feature_squareSearchBar_desc.message: Remove rounded corners from the search bar

feature_stickyChat_desc.message: Keeps the live chat panel pinned at the top of the sidebar when scrolling

feature_stickyVideo_desc.message: Fullscreen video on watch pages. Scroll down to reveal comments side-by-side. Scroll back to top to return to fullscreen.

feature_storageQuotaLRU_desc.message: LRU-cap growing settings (hiddenVideos, hiddenChannels, timestampBookmarks, da_branding_cache, sb_segments_cache) to prevent quota exhaustion

feature_styledFilterChips_desc.message: Compact, native-feeling filter chips on home and subscriptions

feature_subscriptionGroups_desc.message: PocketTube-grade local groups for your subscriptions feed. Create named groups, drag channels in, sort by date/duration/unwatched/new-since-last-visit. Groups data lives in subscriptionGroupData (local only); use Export to back it up.

feature_subscriptionsGrid_desc.message: Use a denser grid layout on the subscriptions page

feature_subtitleDownload_desc.message: One-click SRT download of the active caption track — standalone player button, no sidebar required

feature_subtitleStyling_desc.message: Override YouTube caption appearance — font size/family/color, background, position, shadow

feature_theaterAutoScroll_desc.message: Scroll video into full view when theater mode activates

feature_themeAccentColor_desc.message: Custom accent color for highlights, progress bar, and active UI elements

feature_thumbnailPreviewSize_desc.message: Increase the size of thumbnail hover previews for easier viewing on large screens

feature_thumbnailQualityUpgrade_desc.message: Upgrades video thumbnails to maximum resolution where available

feature_timestampBookmarks_desc.message: Bookmark moments in videos with custom notes. Click a bookmark to seek. Persists across sessions.

feature_titleCaseTransform_desc.message: Override YouTube's clickbait UPPERCASE titles with a casing style of your choice

feature_titleNormalization_desc.message: Convert ALL CAPS titles to Title Case. Reduces clickbait without changing meaning.

feature_tokenThemeBridge_desc.message: Pipes the user's themeAccentColor into YouTube's native --yt-sys-color-* tokens so native badges, hover states, and primary buttons follow the Astra accent without restyling each surface.

feature_transcriptAiHandoff_desc.message: Adds a player-button that copies the transcript and opens your chosen AI tool with a summarization prompt pre-filled

feature_transcriptViewer_desc.message: Adds a clickable transcript panel in the sidebar with timestamp navigation and export (txt/srt/clipboard/LLM prompt)

feature_uiStyleManager_desc.message: Choose rounded or square UI elements

feature_videoAgeColors_desc.message: Color-coded thumbnail borders by upload age — fresh (green), week (blue), month (yellow), year (orange), ancient (red)

feature_videoContextMenu_desc.message: Right-click on the video player for yt-dlp download actions

feature_videoLoopButton_desc.message: Add a loop toggle button to the player controls for one-click video looping

feature_videoNotes_desc.message: Keep a local note for the current video, export the notes archive, and cap the store at the 1000 most recently edited videos.

feature_videoResolutionBadge_desc.message: Shows a 4K, HD, or SD badge on video thumbnails based on available quality

feature_videoRotation_desc.message: Rotate the video 90/180/270 degrees via CSS transform — useful for sideways phone recordings

feature_videoScreenshot_desc.message: Capture the current video frame as a PNG image — copies to clipboard and downloads

feature_videoVisualFilters_desc.message: Adjust brightness / contrast / saturation / hue / grayscale / sepia via CSS filter on the video element

feature_videoZoom_desc.message: Hold Ctrl and scroll on the video to zoom in, then drag to pan around

feature_videosPerRow_desc.message: Set how many video thumbnails per row (0 = dynamic based on window width)

feature_vlcMpvHandoff_desc.message: GitHub-full profile only. Adds buttons next to the player that fire ytvlc:// or ytmpv:// protocol URLs. The protocol handler must be registered on your OS — Astra Deck never runs binaries directly. Default off.

feature_volumeWheelMode_desc.message: Scroll the mouse wheel over the player to change volume in 5% steps. A floating indicator chip surfaces the new level for 1.2 s; no keyboard shortcut is added.

feature_watchHistoryAnalytics_desc.message: Modal dashboard visualizing your 30-day YouTube watch time as a CSS bar chart (requires Watch Time Tracker)

feature_watchLaterCleanup_desc.message: Adds a "Remove Watched" button to the Watch Later playlist header for batch cleanup

feature_watchLaterQuickAdd_desc.message: Adds a clock icon on every thumbnail for one-click Watch Later saving

feature_watchPageRestyle_desc.message: Premium watch-page layout for title, description, and metadata without hiding native controls

feature_watchPageTabs_desc.message: Horizontal tab bar above the comments/description area to quickly switch views on the watch page

feature_watchProgress_desc.message: Show colored progress bars on video thumbnails based on your watch history (saved locally)

feature_watchTimeTracker_desc.message: Track your daily/weekly YouTube watch time with a stats widget in the settings panel

feature_wheelSeek_desc.message: Scroll the mouse wheel over the progress bar to seek. Step defaults to 5 s (configure via wheelSeekStepSec). Scrolling elsewhere over the player still drives Volume Wheel if it is on; the two features do not conflict.

feature_widenSearchBar_desc.message: Expand the search bar to use more available space

feature_wpHide_channelInfoCards_desc.message: Hide channel info cards in description

feature_youtubeMusicCompat_desc.message: Applies Astra Deck themeing + OLED + density features on music.youtube.com. Player-specific features (downloads, RYD, SponsorBlock) keep their existing per-page gating.

feature_zenMode_desc.message: Dims the page around the video player for a focused viewing experience

panelIntro.message: Search, tune, and apply YouTube controls live without leaving the page.

qt_blueLightFilter_desc.message: Warm the player for late viewing

qt_disableAutoplayNext_desc.message: Stop the next video from starting

resultsAllAvailableTpl.message: … quick controls are available in this popup

selectorHealthCopyDone.message: Copied — paste into a GitHub issue.

selectorHealthCopyFail.message: Clipboard write blocked. Open DevTools and call window.__ytkitDiagnostics.download() instead.

selectorHealthCopyNeedYt.message: Open a YouTube tab to build the report.

selectorHealthCopyNoSnap.message: No snapshot available — the page may still be loading.

speedBtnAriaTpl.message: Default playback speed …. Click to change.

speedBtnTitleTpl.message: Default playback speed: … — applies to every video

speedPopupSub.message: Applies to every video until changed.

statusAllDataClearedUndo.message: All data cleared. Click Undo Reset to restore (until you close the browser).

statusMediadlReenableFail.message: Could not re-enable Astra Downloader prompts. Open chrome://extensions and reload.

statusMediadlReenabled.message: Astra Downloader install prompts re-enabled — reload a YouTube tab to see them.

statusOpenWorkspaceFail.message: Could not open the full workspace. Try again.

statusQuickCtrlLoadFail.message: Quick controls could not be loaded. Try reopening the popup.

statusResetSnapshotFail.message: Reset aborted — could not stage an undo snapshot (data too large for recoverable reset). Export a backup first.

statusResetUndoExpired.message: Undo no longer available — snapshot expired with the browser session.

storageBannerCorruptionTpl.message: Storage data malformed — Reset to recover.

storageBannerSoftTpl.message: Storage at {size} — heading toward the ceiling.

toastDlCmdCopied.message: Fallback install command copied. Use it only if you cannot run the downloaded setup file.

toastDlInProgress.message: A download is already in progress.

toastDlInstallPrompt.message: Install Astra Downloader to enable downloads.

toastDlStopped.message: Astra Downloader stopped. Starting it again…

undoResetAria.message: Restore data from the most recent Reset

workspaceSupport.message: Quick toggles save immediately and sync to YouTube.
